zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston於1293年1月8日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，他的父親Sir Giles De Berkeley53歲，母親Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley18歲。他於1319年5月與Katherine de Clevedon在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1361年10月27日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston于1293年1月8日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，他的父亲Sir Giles De Berkeley53岁，母亲Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley18岁。他于1319年5月与Katherine de Clevedon在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1361年10月27日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston was born on 8 January 1293, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Giles De Berkeley, was 53 and his mother, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, was 18. He married Katherine de Clevedon in May 1319, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 27 October 1361, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston est né le 8 janvier 1293, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Giles De Berkeley, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Katherine de Clevedon en mai 1319, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 27 octobre 1361, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston am 8. Januar 1293 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Giles De Berkeley 53 und seine Mutter Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley 18. Er hat im Mai 1319 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Katherine de Clevedon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 27. Oktober 1361 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston è nato il il 8 gennaio 1293 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Giles De Berkeley, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Katherine de Clevedon nel maggio 1319, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 27 ottobre 1361, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Costonが1293年1月8日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Sir Giles De Berkeleyは53歳，母Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeleyは18歳であった。1319年5月にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでKatherine de Clevedonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1361年10月27日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston(이)가 1293년 1월 8일 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Giles De Berkeley(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1319년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Katherine de Clevedon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1361년 10월 27일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에 묻혔다.

pt.8 January 1293–27 October 1361: 8 de janeiro de 1293–27 de outubro de 1361
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1293, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Giles De Berkeley, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine de Clevedon em maio de 1319, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1361, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston родился 8 января 1293 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Giles De Berkeley было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine de Clevedon май 1319 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 27 октября 1361 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.8 January 1293–27 October 1361: 8 de enero de 1293–27 de octubre de 1361
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Berkeley Lord of Coston nació el 8 de enero de 1293, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Giles De Berkeley, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Katherine de Clevedon en mayo de 1319, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1361, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
